_note: 28 sample Year cards. Full deck of 50 in M1 follow-on. Modifiers reference EFFECTS.md ops; some are descriptive in v0 and engine-applied in v0.2.

yearCards.name: The Saturday Pancake
yearCards.flavor: Burned the first one. Got the second one right. The kid ate three.

moment.name: SATURDAY PANCAKE
moment.flavor: Burned the first one. Got the second one right.

yearCards.name: Hot Lava Living Room
yearCards.flavor: The couch is the only safe place. Has been since you were four.

moment.name: HOT LAVA
moment.flavor: Hot lava in the living room. Survivors: zero. Couches: heroic.

yearCards.name: The Surprise Trip
yearCards.flavor: 'Get in the car.' 'Where are we going?' 'You'll see.'

moment_if_both_move.name: SURPRISE TRIP
moment_if_both_move.flavor: Get in the car. We're going.

yearCards.name: Sunday Comics
yearCards.flavor: He has never seen a newspaper before. Pick your jaw back up off the floor.

moment.name: SUNDAY COMICS
moment.flavor: Three generations on one couch. Nobody understood the newspaper.

yearCards.name: The Bedtime Bit
yearCards.flavor: Same story. Same voice for the witch. Same 'oh no, not the witch.' Same kid laughing.

moment_if_kin.name: BEDTIME BIT
moment_if_kin.flavor: Same story. Same voice for the witch.

yearCards.name: The Color Commentary Year
yearCards.flavor: And here he comes, eating a bagel, ladies and gentlemen — the man, the myth—

moment.name: COLOR COMMENTARY
moment.flavor: And here he comes, ladies and gentlemen—

yearCards.name: The Costume Party (At The DMV)
yearCards.flavor: He didn't get the email about not wearing the costume to the DMV. He's not changing now.

yearCards.name: The Sourdough Year
yearCards.flavor: The starter has a name. The kid named it. The kid named it Glenn.

moment.name: SOURDOUGH
moment.flavor: The starter has a name. It's Glenn.

yearCards.name: The Letter Home
yearCards.flavor: You wrote the postcard from a parking lot. The breakfast knows.

moment.name: LETTER HOME
moment.flavor: I miss the breakfast. The breakfast knows.

yearCards.name: The Long Hug
yearCards.flavor: You held it longer than usual. Nobody had to say why.

yearCards.name: Sitting With Sadness
yearCards.flavor: You didn't fix it. You weren't supposed to. Anything mentionable is manageable.

moment.name: SITTING WITH
moment.flavor: You sat with them for an hour. You didn't have answers. You stayed.

yearCards.name: The Note In The Lunch
yearCards.flavor: Same joke every Tuesday. They never said they liked it. They never threw the note away.

yearCards.name: The Day My Dad Showed Up
yearCards.flavor: You don't remember what he said. You remember he was there.

moment.name: SHOWED UP
moment.flavor: You don't remember what he said. You remember he was there.

yearCards.name: The Forgotten Lunch
yearCards.flavor: You let him learn the natural consequence. You also drove the lunch over at 11:30.

moment_if_tending_and_mending.name: FORGOTTEN LUNCH
moment_if_tending_and_mending.flavor: It only gets better if I sit in the embarrassment.

yearCards.name: The Severe Tire Damage Year
yearCards.flavor: You handled it. Mostly didn't panic. Did not call your wife to come hold your hand.

moment.name: HANDLED IT
moment.flavor: You are, in fact, an adult who can occasionally play this minor role.

yearCards.name: The Garbage Disposal Year
yearCards.flavor: You don't need everything to be a science experiment. You can just throw it away and take the trash out.

yearCards.name: The Wrong Washer
yearCards.flavor: Replaced the wrong washer. Flooded the basement. Laughed first. Then fixed it.

yearCards.name: The 11:30 Bedtime Compromise
yearCards.flavor: You said 9. They asked for 10. You said 9:30. Everyone left at 11:30 happy.

yearCards.name: The Block Party
yearCards.flavor: You brought the speakers. Nobody asked. Nobody complained. The kid danced.

moment_if_both_have_2.name: BLOCK PARTY
moment_if_both_have_2.flavor: Nobody asked. Nobody complained. The kid danced.

yearCards.name: Coaching Practice
yearCards.flavor: You weren't sure they'd listen. They listened. Don't admit you were nervous.

yearCards.name: The Field Trip
yearCards.flavor: You volunteered. You haven't slept. The bus driver asks if you're a parent or a chaperone. The kid claims you twice.

yearCards.name: The Tutor Hour
yearCards.flavor: They don't know how to do their math. You don't either. You learn it together.

moment_if_wondering_played.name: TUTOR HOUR
moment_if_wondering_played.flavor: I don't know. What do you think?

yearCards.name: Calling The Old Man
yearCards.flavor: You called because the kid asked the question you didn't know how to answer. The old man knew. Of course he knew.

yearCards.name: His Mother's Birthday
yearCards.flavor: She loved that song. The kid knew the song before they knew her. That's how it goes.

moment.name: HIS MOTHER'S BIRTHDAY
moment.flavor: The kid knew the song before they knew her.

yearCards.name: The Family Reunion
yearCards.flavor: Three generations. One backyard. The kid asked who that man was. You told them their great-uncle. They asked again. Long story.

yearCards.name: The Quiet Year
yearCards.flavor: Nobody had anywhere to be. Nobody filled the silence. It was hard. It was good.

yearCards.name: The Recovery Year
yearCards.flavor: Some years you come back from. This was one. 'I am not the man I was last year. That is the work.'

yearCards.name: The First Real Talk
yearCards.flavor: You sat with them for an hour. You didn't have answers. You stayed.

moment.name: FIRST REAL TALK
moment.flavor: You sat with them. You stayed.
